property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: [11:130] metricool returns a deterministic happy path when API-GLOBAL is mocked
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: [12:144] metricool surfaces a mocked downstream unauthorized response in a controlled way
[13:156] metricool surfaces a mocked downstream unavailable response in a controlled way
[14:168] metricool exposes a mocked incomplete downstream payload without inventing a loginUrl
[15:181] metricool surfaces a mocked business error wrapped in a 200 response
[5:40] gbp posts returns a deterministic mocked happy path
[8:148] gbp posts surfaces a mocked downstream unavailable response in a controlled way
[9:163] gbp posts surfaces a mocked business error wrapped in a controlled response
[10:176] gbp posts exposes an empty mocked payload as an empty list
[11:188] gbp posts does not invent multimedia when the mocked wrapper payload is incomplete
[3:21] yext diffusion returns a deterministic mocked happy path
[5:53] yext diffusion surfaces a mocked downstream unavailable response in a controlled way
[6:65] yext diffusion surfaces a mocked business error wrapped in a 200 response
[7:77] yext diffusion exposes a mocked incomplete publishers payload
[11:121] yext connect returns a deterministic mocked happy path
[13:157] yext connect surfaces a mocked downstream unavailable response in a controlled way
[14:172] yext connect surfaces a mocked business error wrapped in a 200 response
[15:187] yext connect exposes a mocked incomplete diffusion payload
[16:203] yext disconnect returns a deterministic mocked happy path
[18:239] yext disconnect surfaces a mocked downstream unavailable response in a controlled way
[22:284] yext disconnect surfaces a mocked business error wrapped in a 200 response
[23:299] yext disconnect exposes a mocked incomplete diffusion payload
